African carbon markets, built right

High-integrity carbon credits.Across energy, forests, and blue carbon.

Foovante is the verification, marketplace, and capital layer for African carbon. Whether you fund projects, run one, or want to invest in the company: start here.

Browse projects →
3 active projects · baseline phase
8,100 ha under MRV by Q2 2026
10 smallholder programs
Accra, Ghana · operational
Three audiences. One platform.

Tell us who you are.

Foovante serves the people who fund carbon work, the people who run it, and the people backing the company itself. Pick the door that fits.

For Funders

Pre-purchase verified African carbon credits.

Foovante connects capital to high-integrity African carbon projects. Pre-purchase credits at fixed prices with a full audit trail per tonne.

  • Credit pre-purchase at fixed prices
  • Full audit trail per tonne
  • Satellite-verified baselines
Browse projects →
For Projects

Turn your land work into real climate finance.

African renewable-energy, agriculture, and forestry projects: register, baseline, verify, and list — without losing a large share to middlemen.

  • ~12 weeks to first issuance
  • Competitive revenue share to project
  • Sentinel-2 baselining included
Apply to list your project →
For Investors

Back the verification layer of African carbon.

We're raising the company building the rails for Africa's carbon markets. Pre-seed round open to thesis-aligned investors.

  • 3 live projects · baseline phase
  • 8,100 ha under MRV by Q2 2026
  • Pre-seed round open
Request the data room →
Why Foovante

African carbon, run by people on the ground.

The carbon market is broken because verification is broken. We're rebuilding it from Accra, with satellites, soil samples, and local agents, so credits issued in Africa stand up to any scrutiny, anywhere.

Continuous MRV, not annual paperwork

Every project polygon is monitored every 5 days at 10m resolution via Sentinel-2. Automatically, not on a clipboard.

Most of the money goes to the project

We are designing our fee structure so the majority of every credit sale flows back to project work. Industry average is around 40%; we intend to do significantly better.

Built on the continent

Headquartered in Accra, operating in Ghana today with expansion planned across the continent. No flying experts in from Geneva.

Standards-anchored

Every credit on Foovante is issued under Verra VCS, Gold Standard, or Plan Vivo, and serialised on-chain for traceability.

One platform. Three doors. The same goal.

Pick the door that fits, and start moving real climate capital into real African projects, with real verification behind it.
